channel.title: NPR Topics: Technology
channel.description: Latest technology news and breakthroughs in technology, science, and industry. Download the NPR Technology podcast and Technology RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Billboard ads for tech startups in San Francisco are cryptic on purpose
item.description: The old-fashioned roadside billboard is hot property these days in San Francisco, with tech startups snapping up ad space. But it's often not clear what they're selling.
item.content:encoded: The old-fashioned roadside billboard is hot property these days in San Francisco, with tech startups snapping up ad space. But it's often not clear what they're selling.
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: It's called 'private credit' — and it could lead to big trouble on Wall Street
item.description: The risky lending business has been booming, but now its problems are becoming increasingly visible on Wall Street and beyond.
item.content:encoded:
The risky lending business has been booming, but now its problems are becoming increasingly visible on Wall Street and beyond.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan

item.title: Do you understand this billboard? If not, that's the whole point
item.description: San Francisco's streets are plastered with cryptic ads from AI startups. The strategy is intentional — but it's not without cost.
item.content:encoded:
San Francisco's streets are plastered with cryptic ads from AI startups. The strategy is intentional — but it's not without cost.

(Image credit: Chloe Veltman)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: How drones are reshaping modern warfare around the globe
item.description: From global conflicts to criminal networks, drones are reshaping the nature of war and the balance of power.
item.content:encoded: From global conflicts to criminal networks, drones are reshaping the nature of war and the balance of power.
item.dc:creator: Joanna Kakissis

item.title: Arizona AG files criminal charges against Kalshi over 'illegal gambling'
item.description: Arizona is the first state to allege the prediction market company has committed criminal violations, accusing it of running an unlicensed gambling operation.
item.content:encoded:
Arizona is the first state to allege the prediction market company has committed criminal violations, accusing it of running an unlicensed gambling operation.

(Image credit: Scott Olson)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: But can it cook? Planet Money checks out restaurant automation -- and a robot wok
item.description: Automation has made its way into restaurant kitchens. Planet Money looks at what the effects of automation have been historically — and watches a robot wok in action to see how it may change things.
item.content:encoded: Automation has made its way into restaurant kitchens. Planet Money looks at what the effects of automation have been historically — and watches a robot wok in action to see how it may change things.
item.dc:creator: Erika Beras

item.title: Tennessee teens sue Elon Musk's xAI over AI-generated child sexual abuse material
item.description: The three girls say that the nonconsensual nude images were created by a perpetrator who used AI company xAI's image generation tools.
item.content:encoded:
The three girls say that the nonconsensual nude images were created by a perpetrator who used AI company xAI's image generation tools.

(Image credit: Nicolas Tucat)
item.dc:creator: Huo Jingnan

item.title: How the U.S. is using AI in the war in Iran
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe talks to Lauren Kahn of Georgetown University's Center for Security and Emerging Technology about the role of artificial intelligence in war.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe talks to Lauren Kahn of Georgetown University's Center for Security and Emerging Technology about the role of artificial intelligence in war.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Benk

item.title: Can you write off a pet dog? How to vet tax advice from social media
item.description: So you heard a piece of tax advice from a friend or on social media that sounds interesting. Should you try it? A certified public accountant explains how to vet the claim — and avoid getting scammed.
item.content:encoded: So you heard a piece of tax advice from a friend or on social media that sounds interesting. Should you try it? A certified public accountant explains how to vet the claim — and avoid getting scammed.
item.dc:creator: Marielle Segarra

item.title: Giant robots battle it out in Detroit's Robowar
item.description: Fighting robots is a cultural fantasy going back at least to Richard Matheson's 1956 story "Steel." One Detroit impresario is now bringing the idea to the stage — and real audiences.
item.content:encoded:
Fighting robots is a cultural fantasy going back at least to Richard Matheson's 1956 story "Steel." One Detroit impresario is now bringing the idea to the stage — and real audiences.

(Image credit: Timothy Chen Allen)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby
